untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'slow, short-lived false breakouts' and 'sharp, quick bounces' which require multi-bar pattern recognition, momentum acceleration thresholds, and time-duration logic not expressible with single-bar indicator conditions. Parameters like 'false_breakout_duration', 'bounce_speed_threshold', and 'trend_definition' are marked AUTHOR_SILENT and cannot be inferred. Approximated entry with small body candles (body_pct < 0.3) and trend filter, but true false-breakout confirmation pattern is not translatable.
translation_notes: Used sma_50 as proxy for main trend direction. Used body_pct < 0.3 to approximate 'slow' false breakout candles. Sharp bounce-back requirement and precise timing cannot be captured. This is a partial approximation only.
